modmenu.descriptionTranslation.roadarchi: Travel around the world without barriers: RoadArchitect automatically scans your world, finds villages, and other structures, and then lays a network of roads between them.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.Lam: Block identifier used for the ground support portion (typically a wall).
Biome IDs or #tags where this style can spawn. Leave empty to turn it into a global fallback.
Block identifier used for the hanging light (must support hanging lantern placement).
Block identifier used for the vertical post and arm (typically a fence).
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.Roa: Block identifier or #tag used by the decoration when applicable.
Choose how to decorate this style (None or Fence).
Block identifier or #block tag added to the surface palette.
Relative chance for this entry when picking surface blocks.
Biome IDs or #tags that use this style. Leave empty to make it the global fallback.
Optional side decorations placed alongside this road style.
List of block entries (blocks or #tags) with weights that control surface composition.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.bop: Toggle to apply the Biomes O' Plenty presets; disable to fall back to vanilla-only styles.
Install Biomes O' Plenty to unlock these presets.
Editable road style entries targeting Biomes O' Plenty biome selectors.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.buo: Distance in blocks along water path between buoys.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.cac: Allows a background worker to prefetch cache data instead of building everything on demand.
Caches biome lookup results on disk for faster warmups.
Stores resolved height columns on disk so they survive reloads.
Writes terrain stability metrics to disk alongside other cache data.
Memory cap for the paged region buffer that mirrors on-disk cache pages.
Maximum number of chunks a single prefill pass is allowed to touch.
Edge length of each paged region stored on disk. Larger pages reduce lookups but increase I/O bursts.
Heap budget dedicated to the in-memory column cache before entries are evicted to disk.
RAM reserved for chunk snapshot data used by the generation pipeline.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.chu: Radius in chunks scanned when new chunks generate.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.deb: Emits cache-specific debug lines for prefill, loads, and saves.
Runs the pipeline profiler during road generation to collect detailed timing information.
Writes debug-only messages at info level to help with troubleshooting. May be noisy.
Adds Road Architect cache usage statistics to the F3 debug screen.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.det: Place lamps, buoys and sides using a global marker grid (chunk-agnostic).
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.dim: List of dimension identifiers where roads should operate.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.for: Radius around forbidden biomes that adds an extra penalty.
Penalty applied when near a forbidden biome.
List of biome selectors (IDs or #tags) that roads cannot traverse.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.ini: Radius in chunks to scan for structures when the world is first loaded.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.lam: Distance in blocks along the path between lamp posts.
Toggle to apply the editable entries below; disable to restore the built-in presets.
Define custom lamp post styles. Each entry lists biomes it applies to; if multiple entries cover a biome, a random style is picked.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.mas: Symmetric erosion near land/water transitions; excludes E points near edges.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.max: Maximum distance in blocks between two structures to connect them.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.pat: If A* fails but reaches good convergence (>= threshold), accept the best partial path to increase success rate.
Radius in blocks around water biomes that incurs a proximity penalty.
Penalty applied when within the coast buffer to avoid hugging shorelines.
Minimum convergence (in %) to accept a partial path when A* doesn't reach the goal.
Adds extra cost to water steps and near-coast cells so land routes are preferred.
Additional cost added on each step in ocean/river biomes when preference is enabled.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.pip: Delay in seconds between pipeline runs.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.roa: Toggle to apply the editable road style entries; disable to restore the built-in presets.
Define custom surface palettes and decorations. Entries without selectors act as a fallback.
Width of generated road segments in blocks (odd values recommended).
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.sid: Distance in blocks between side decorations along the path.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.str: List of structure selectors that roads will connect.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.option.ter: Steer roads around rough/mountainous terrain by penalizing height variance.
Penalty per block of height range above threshold.
Window radius in blocks to measure height range.
Minimum height range before applying penalty.
Sampling step in blocks within the window.
text.autoconfig.roadarchitect.title: Road Architect Config
text.config.roadarchitect.option.chunkGe: Radius in chunks scanned when new chunks generate.
text.config.roadarchitect.option.dimensi: List of dimension identifiers where roads should operate.
text.config.roadarchitect.option.initSca: Radius in chunks to scan for structures when the world is first loaded.
text.config.roadarchitect.option.maxConn: Maximum distance in blocks between two structures to connect them.
text.config.roadarchitect.option.pipelin: Delay in seconds between pipeline runs.
text.config.roadarchitect.option.structu: List of structure selectors that roads will connect.
